name: The Back Nine Golf | Jacksonville Beach, FL
about: The Back Nine Golf in Jacksonville Beach, FL is a golf simulation venue that offers an indoor golf experience. The facility appears to focus on providing a space for golfers to play and practice using simulator technology. While specific details about the equipment or amenities are not readily available from the website, the venue aims to serve the local golf community in the Jacksonville Beach area. Pricing and operational details were not accessible at the time of data extraction.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf simulation technology available for year-round play
Convenient location in Jacksonville Beach for local residents
Supports both casual play and serious practice sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue likely provides rental clubs, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for the most accurate simulation experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for purchase on-site, but the venue may allow outside food and drinks depending on their policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole rounds on simulators take 1-2 hours depending on player skill level and group size.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf appears to be family-friendly and welcomes junior golfers.
